g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does gradient boosting learn decision trees?')

g.text: Output: [p_DDoS, p_DoS, p_Recon, p_Normal] — one vector per 10 s window
argmax gives class · max value is confidence · threshold 0.70 triggers alert

svg.text: 99.87% accuracy on real held-out test · 5-fold CV F1 99.93% ± 0.02%
